description.ko: 흰 공백 속에서 폴리곤 파편으로 산산조각 나는 거대한 흑요석 모놀리스와 강렬한 글리치 아트.
description.en: A massive obsidian monolith shattering into polygonal shards within a white void, featuring heavy glitch art and chromatic aberration.

prompt: A brutalist digital sculpture by KURO-X, titled 'The Monolithic Defragmentation.' A massive #1A1A1A obsidian monolith suspended in a sterile #FFFFFF void, undergoing a violent geometric collapse into thousands of #808080 and #C0C0C0 razor-sharp polygonal shards. The composition is sliced by intense digital glitch artifacts, pixel sorting layers, and extreme RGB chromatic aberration. High-contrast ray-traced reflections on shifting obsidian planes. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution, capturing the mathematical elegance of systematic chaos.
